about.a_title: One team with a bias for shipping.
about.a_sub: devora is a compact, senior studio — strategy, design and engineering under one roof, building websites with a presence you can feel.
about.story_p1: The name is dev + aura: the rigor of engineering, and the presence great design leaves behind. Most sites get one or the other — a pretty template no one maintains, or solid code that feels lifeless. We refuse the trade-off.
about.story_p2: So we kept the team small and senior, and put every discipline on the same brief. Strategy talks to design, design talks to code, and nothing gets lost in a handoff. The result looks considered and runs fast — because the same people made both true.
about.diff_title: No middlemen. No lost handoffs. No filler.
about.diff_1_d: The people who plan it are the people who build it.
about.diff_2_d: You work with the makers, not a rotating cast of juniors.
about.diff_3_d: Native EN & AR, RTL done right — not an afterthought.
about.diff_4_d: Clean, documented, editable — yours to run after we hand it over.
about.val_title: A few things we hold to.
about.val_1_d: We earn the design by getting the thinking right first.
about.val_2_d: A beautiful site that doesn't perform isn't finished.
about.val_3_d: Speed, polish and the small details are part of the product.
about.val_4_d: One team accountable from first sketch to live site.
about.team_sub: Engineers, designers and strategists who ship together — on the same brief, in the same room.

process.pr_title: From brief to live in five moves.
process.pr_sub: A calm, predictable path. You always know what stage we're in, what we need from you, and what comes next.
process.s1_d: We dig into your goals, audience and scope — and ask the questions most agencies skip. No assumptions, no guesswork.
process.s2_d: We turn the brief into a plan: strategy, sitemap, timeline and budget — one document everyone signs before a pixel moves.
process.s3_d: From wireframes to a pixel-perfect, reusable system — reviewed together at every step, so there are no surprises later.
process.s3_out: A design system you've seen and approved.
process.s4_d: Clean, tested code with your real content in it. Fast, accessible, and easy for your team to edit after we're gone.
process.s4_out: A tested, editable site with real content.
process.s5_d: We go live, measure what matters, and keep improving. A support window on every build, and a Care Plan when you want more.
process.s5_out: A live site, measured and improving.

industries.i2_d: Fast, trustworthy stores that turn browsers into buyers.
industries.i3_d: Clinics, firms and consultancies that need to look credible and convert.
industries.i4_d: Menus, bookings and galleries that fill tables and rooms.
industries.i5_d: Launch-ready marketing sites that keep up with a moving product.
industries.i6_d: Bilingual EN/AR sites that speak to the whole market, RTL and all.

faq.f_sub: If yours isn't here, just ask — we reply within two working days.
faq.q1: Do you work with clients outside your region?
faq.a1: Yes — we're remote-first and work across MENA and worldwide. Most collaboration happens over calls and shared docs, in your timezone when it matters.
faq.q2: Can you build in both English and Arabic?
faq.a2: It's our default. We design and build bilingual EN/AR sites with proper RTL — not a bolted-on translation. Brand names and numerals stay correct in both directions.
faq.q3: Can you redesign an existing site?
faq.a3: Often the best value. We audit what you have, keep what works, and rebuild the rest on a faster, cleaner foundation.
faq.q4: Do you offer AI and automation?
faq.a4: Yes — chatbots, workflow automation and custom AI wired into the tools you already use, so routine work runs itself.
faq.q5: How much does a project cost?
faq.a5: A landing page is about $1,650 to build, then $200/mo. A full business site runs ~$2,650 + $250/mo, and a larger custom or e-commerce build ~$5,000 + $300/mo. The monthly covers hosting, updates and support — no hidden fees.
faq.a6: The low monthly built into every plan ($200–$300): hosting, updates, security, care and support that keep your site fast and current after launch — so it keeps improving instead of going stale.
faq.q7: How long does a website take?
faq.a7: A focused landing page can ship in about two weeks. A full brand-and-site build is typically 4–8 weeks, depending on scope and how fast feedback comes back.
faq.q8: What do you need from us to start?
faq.a8: A conversation. We'll ask about your goals, audience and timeline, then come back with a plan and a quote — usually within two working days.
faq.q9: Do we own the site and code?
faq.a9: Completely. We hand over clean, documented, editable code and a CMS you can run yourself. No lock-in.
faq.a10: Yes. We set up a friendly CMS and train your team, so day-to-day updates never need us.
faq.q11: Do you do SEO and marketing?
faq.a11: Launch is a start, not the finish. We handle SEO foundations, analytics, content and campaigns — and a Care Plan keeps them going.
faq.a12: We stick around: a support window on every build, and an optional Care Plan for ongoing design, dev and growth.

hero.sub: One partner for strategy, brand, product, growth & AI — engineered from a single idea into a self-scaling empire.

manifesto.label: the DEVORA doctrine
manifesto.h2a: Most agencies hand you a website.

principles.d: Strategy through scaling under one roof. No handoffs, no finger-pointing, no lost momentum.
Every asset feeds a system. Brand fuels demand, product retains it, data sharpens the next move.
We move at the pace of ambition. Weeks, not quarters — with the polish of a decade-old brand.

stages.d: A single glowing spark of ambition. Everything begins here.
The spark becomes structure — architecture before aesthetics.
Structure becomes a living design system, component by component.
Design becomes a real, fast, breathing product.
The right people start arriving — engineered, not hoped for.
Every signal captured. The system learns what works.
Demand generation kicks in and never stops pulsing.
Attention converts. The numbers begin to climb.
It all connects into one self-scaling empire.
